flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Jackson State Community College fell 32% between 2006 and 2009 (11.7% → 8.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 27% at Jackson State Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.2k vs 3.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Jackson State Community College rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (44.5% → 54.3%).
